stem: In triangle LMP, side LM extends to point N. The exterior angle LMN at vertex M measures 124°. If the interior angles MLP and MPL are equal, what is the measure of angle MLP, in degrees?
rationale: Choice B is correct. The interior angle LMP equals 180 − 124 = 56° (linear pair). Since the other two interior angles of the triangle are equal and sum to 180 − 56 = 124, each measures 62°. Therefore angle MLP = 62.
